tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $108.12 May 4 (0.0%, TradingEconomics; flat since May 1 $108.10). Project Freedom launches May 4 - US CENTCOM deploys destroyers + 15K troops to Hormuz; ambiguous signal. Mine-clearing ~6 months (PBS) - Hormuz physical reopening delayed even on deal. Nuclear stalemate persists; Iran warns Project Freedom violates ceasefire - tail risk from confrontation. Tail (45%) + Stress (45%) = 90% continued disruption. Stop-loss: confirmed deal + mine clearance + P&I restoration (Brent sub-$92). Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $108.12 May 4 (flat, TradingEconomics); ASEAN Energy ~143.5 est. (+0.35%); ASEAN Banks ~175.5 est. (+0.57%). iTraxx Asia IG ~192bp (-3bp est.); ASEAN HY ~577bp (-5bp est.). Project Freedom May 4 marginally risk-on; Shipping equities up on transit signal (+1.3% est.); nuclear stalemate unchanged. ASEAN Energy long supported at $108 stress floor; Banks underweight easing slightly. Tail (45%): US-Iran Hormuz confrontation drives Brent $130+, iTraxx 230-260bp. Conviction medium on both legs.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Hold on Talks Collapse
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~58.47 est. (-0.22% May 4). Project Freedom announced May 4 - slight EM FX positive (USD/PHP edging lower); nuclear stalemate unchanged; Iran warns ceasefire violation; tail risk 45%. Full PHP recovery capped - Hormuz physical reopening requires mine clearance ~6 months even on deal. USD Call/PHP Put 61.00 overlay retains tail hedge value. Stop-loss: confirmed full Hormuz reopening with P&I restoration below 58.00. Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Hold on Re-Escalation
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~17,040 est. (-0.29% May 4); Indonesia 10Y ~7.28% est. (-2bp). Brent $108.12 May 4 - ICP overshoot ~$38/bbl, severe fiscal pressure persists. Project Freedom marginally risk-on for EM FX; nuclear stalemate and blockade intact; Iran warns ceasefire violation; tail risk 45%. Hold IDR short at half-size; fiscal strain keeps risk elevated. Stop-loss at USD/IDR 16,600 (confirmed Hormuz reopening). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Hold at 210bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~192bp (-3bp May 4 est.); ASEAN HY ~577bp (-5bp est.). Project Freedom May 4 provides marginal spread relief (risk-on signal); nuclear stalemate and Iran ceasefire-violation warning keep tail elevated. Mine-clearing ~6 months post-deal; full Hormuz commercial reopening delayed. Hold CDS protection at trimmed size; tail (45%): US-Iran Hormuz incident drives iTraxx 230-260bp; stress (45%) stabilises 185-215bp. Remove at confirmed deal + mine clearance + spreads below 175bp. Conviction medium.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold on Talks Collapse
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM carried $16.48 (Apr 28 confirmed, TradingEconomics); TTF €45.08 May 4 (-2.3%, TradingEconomics). Project Freedom creates partial Hormuz transit capability - TTF easing (-2.3%) on European gas relief; JKM less responsive as Ras Laffan restart not before late Aug 2026; mine-clearing ~6 months regardless. Hold JKM long; nuclear stalemate maintains structural JKM premium vs TTF. Stress target $18-22 JKM; tail target $26-30. Stop at confirmed mine clearance + P&I restoration. Conviction medium.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary
